domain: carillon music (tuning of bronze bell sets)
specific_mechanism: Carillon tuning: bronze bells have inharmonic partials; tuning each bell removes topological inharmonicity defects to achieve consonance
llm_application: LLM frequency-domain detuning: model's spectral activations have inharmonic partials; targeted tuning removes topological defects to achieve task-consistent representations.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes carillon-music topological-defect mapping as proposed.
